description_long: This is a large, ornate hammer with a robust cylindrical head and a long, straight handle. The head features a spiked crown on one side and a central spike on top, giving it a menacing, medieval appearance. The handle is metallic with a slightly weathered, bronze-like finish and a squared base, suggesting durability and strength. Decorative engravings and geometric shapes are visible on the head, adding to its elaborate design. The hammer appears to be constructed primarily from metal, with no visible soft or ergonomic grip enhancements. Its overall design suggests it could be used as a ceremonial or heavy-duty tool, rather than a standard utility hammer.
description: A large, ornate metal hammer with a spiked, cylindrical head and a long, straight handle featuring decorative engravings and a weathered bronze finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the spiked crown on the left side of the head and the central spike on top, with the full length of the handle visible.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the cylindrical shape of the head and the pointed spike protruding forward, with the handle appearing narrow.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the spiked crown on the right and the central spike, with the handle and base clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the cylindrical head and spike, with the spiked crown now on the far side, and the handle's symmetry evident.
attribute_handle_type: Straight metal handle with a squared base, slightly weathered and lacking ergonomic or textured grip enhancements.
attribute_head_type: Large cylindrical metal head with a spiked crown on one side and a central spike on top, resembling a ceremonial or war hammer.
